ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or abbreviation for the parameter */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Full name of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., Clock, Address, Data) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the parameter is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the parameter */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the usage */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the parameter used */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who recorded the usage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the usage was recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the usage record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_usage_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_usage_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES parameter_versions ("version_id")
)
column_names: Symbol or abbreviation for the parameter
Unit of measurement for the parameter
Category of the parameter (e.g., Clock, Address, Data)
User who last updated the parameter
Date the parameter was last updated
Flag to indicate if the parameter is active
ID of the parameter this version belongs to
Description of changes made in this version
Flag to indicate if the version is active
Unique identifier for each usage entry
ID of the parameter being used
ID of the project using the parameter
Flag to indicate if the usage record is active
